name: Monte Euxe
description: In this world there is 16 continents and there is a power that can be obtained through training called Ki. Ki is a power that can heal or destroy, many ambitious people have used this power to subdue nations and cities, but only a very few have ever subdued and conquered a continental. Those that have conquered a continent and have Dominion over it are the Continental Lords and they are very powerful, the world government has placed a Large bounty on their heads. There are only 4 Continental Lord's and they control a continent that they have conquered and want to conquer more, but there are a group of equal leveled individuals who have been assigned the other 12 Continents to protect them from Ambitious people like the Continental Lords.
creator: Trevor66
